result.reason: Feature request to allow merging of connection configuration files and an option for automatic export, enhancing configuration management.
result.approach: Introduce new UI elements in FrmMain and potentially FrmOptions for merge and auto-export functionalities. Implement logic within ConnectionsConfigManager to handle parsing and merging of XML connection file structures. Modify XmlConnectionsSaver and XmlConnectionsDeserializer to support the merge process and enable an auto-export mechanism based on user settings.
